name: Send overdue invoice reminders from Pennylane to Slack

parameters.content:
# Send overdue invoice reminders from Pennylane to Slack

## Who is this for

Finance teams and freelancers using Pennylane who want daily alerts for unpaid invoices that need follow-up.

## What it does

This workflow runs daily at 9 AM, fetches all customer invoices from Pennylane, and identifies unpaid invoices past their deadline by 7 or more days. If overdue invoices are found, it sends a detailed Slack reminder with invoice number, amount, days overdue, and a direct link to the PDF. If no invoices are overdue, the workflow ends silently.

## How to set up

1. Import this workflow into n8n
2. Create a Header Auth credential: name `Authorization`, value `Bearer <YOUR_PENNYLANE_TOKEN>`
3. Select your Slack channel in the SL Send Notification node
4. Adjust the schedule time in the Schedule Trigger node if needed
5. Change THRESHOLD_DAYS in the Code Filter Overdue node to adjust sensitivity (default: 7 days)

## Requirements

- Pennylane account with API access (Essentiel plan or higher)
- Pennylane API token with scope: customer_invoices:all
- (Optional) Slack workspace

Part of a 3-workflow billing suite: https://github.com/Gauthier-Huguenin/n8n-pennylane-auto-invoicing

---

### Flow

`Schedule Trigger`
  → `PL Fetch Invoices`
  → `Code Filter Overdue`
  → `IF Has Overdue`
    → ✅ `Code Build Reminder` → `SL Send Notification`
    → ❌ `Set Done`

---

### Node refs for $()

- Schedule Trigger
- PL Fetch Invoices
- Code Filter Overdue
- IF Has Overdue
- Code Build Reminder
- SL Send Notification
- Set Done

## 1. Trigger

Runs once daily at 9:00 AM.
Checks for overdue invoices that need
follow-up.

Adjust schedule in the Schedule Trigger
node to fit your needs.

## 2. Fetch invoices

Retrieves all customer invoices from Pennylane.

Endpoint: GET /customer_invoices

Same approach as WF2: no server-side
status filtering available, all logic
is handled in the Code node.

## 3. Filter overdue

Identifies unpaid invoices past their
deadline by at least 7 days (THRESHOLD_DAYS).

Adjust the threshold in Code Filter Overdue
to change the sensitivity.

Skips draft and paid invoices.
Calculates exact days overdue for each.

## 4. Notify

Builds a detailed reminder with:
- Invoice number and amount
- Due date and days overdue
- Direct link to the invoice PDF

Sends to Slack. Replace with your preferred
notification channel (Telegram, Email, etc.).

## 5. Done

No overdue invoices detected.
Workflow ends silently.

This node ensures a clean execution log
in n8n. No notification is sent.
